title: E-commerce Product Recommendation Engine with Dynamic Pricing

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: E-commerce Product Recommendation Engine with Dynamic Pricing

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='50' y='50' width='300' height='200' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/><path d='M 100 100 L 200 100' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'/><g fill='#B7D7CD'><rect x='50' y='150' width='300' height='50' rx='10'/><text x='150' y='170' font-size='20' font-family='Arial' text-anchor='middle'>Search Product:</text></g><g fill='#C06C88'><rect x='100' y='200' width='200' height='50' rx='10'/><text x='250' y='220' font-size='20' font-family='Arial' text-anchor='middle'>Category: All</text></g><g fill='#411C56'><rect x='50' y='250' width='300' height='50' rx='10'/><g fill='#B7D7CD'><rect x='50' y='260' width='100' height='20' rx='5'/><text x='75' y='275' font-size='16' font-family='Arial' text-anchor='middle'>Price: $0-$100</text></g><g fill='#C06C88'><rect x='170' y='260' width='125' height='20' rx='5'/><text x='215' y='275' font-size='16' font-family='Arial' text-anchor='middle'>Brand: Apple</text></g></g>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use only specified colors and layout
Must implement dynamic pricing based on user selection
Must be fully interactive with state updates

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: E-commerce Product Recommendation Engine with Dynamic Pricing

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, filtering system, and dynamic pricing.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
